author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Nintendo says Switch 2 price increase doesn’t cover all costs, hopes its upcoming games will help to ‘overcome this barrier’ President Shuntaro Furukawa says the aim is for Switch 2's lifespan to last as long as Switch

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Several Xbox users managed to download Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight, 10 days early The whole game was seemingly accidentally made playable over the weekend

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Forza Horizon 6 appears to have leaked online Pirated copies have already started appearing
